headline: Eli Lilly (LLY) Receives FDA Approval for Foundayo Weight Management Pill
summary: Eli Lilly and Company (NYSE:LLY) is one of the best future stocks to buy for the next 5 years. On April 1, Eli Lilly announced the FDA approval of Foundayo (orforglipron), the first once-daily GLP-1 receptor agonist pill for chronic weight management that can be taken without food or water restrictions. headline: Novo Nordisk Shares Down 43% in a Year as Generic Rivals Force 48% Price Cuts
summary: One of the world’s leading healthcare names, Novo Nordisk (NYSE:NVO) cut prices on Wegovy and Ozempic by up to 48% in India at the start of April 2026, a direct response to low-cost generic semaglutide flooding the market. A debate has been building on Reddit for weeks: is Novo Nordisk a deeply undervalued pharmaceutical franchise ... Novo Nordisk Shares Down 43% in a Year as Generic Rivals Force 48% Price Cuts

headline: Novo Nordisk Wegovy Data Challenges Foundayo And Resets Valuation Debate
summary: Novo Nordisk released new cross trial data indicating its oral Wegovy pill produces greater weight loss than Eli Lilly’s newly FDA approved obesity pill Foundayo. The company reports fewer adverse events with Wegovy compared with Foundayo and cites strong patient preference for Wegovy’s treatment profile. This is the first direct comparison between the two oral GLP 1 obesity treatments as Eli Lilly prepares to launch Foundayo in the United States. For investors watching CPSE:NOVO B, this...
